name: Jacked & Tan 2.0 (TM Periodized)
description: A 4-day Jacked & Tan 2.0 built around training max inputs and fixed 6-week prescriptions. Exercise selection follows the checked-in workbook while the app derives weekly loads from the selected lift mappings.

localizedName.zh: Jacked & Tan 2.0（训练最大值周期版）

localizedDescription.zh: 基于训练最大值输入和固定六周处方构建的四天 Jacked & Tan 2.0。动作选择遵循仓库内表格，训练重量由应用按主项映射自动计算。
